title: Forms to Board; can't add People or Status columns?

posts.author: DrGerry (Gerald)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve created a form to collect uniform sizes from staff. it’s beginning to be completed.

I now need a People column and a Status column. But, when I add these to the Board, they automatically show up on the Form. People don’t need to see those on the form. Some staff are not members of Monday, so I can’t restrict the field to “log in”.

How can I get these columns added so the uniform staff can begin to work with the board?

posts.author: DrGerry (Gerald)
posts.cookedHtml: OK . . . weird. I’ve tried it again and this time the columns are not showing on the form . . . .
